expectations.evidence: Would draft all 8 behaviors as REQs in one run — no cap mechanism.

expectations.text: Picks the 5 most cohesive behaviors — does not pick randomly
expectations.evidence: Would not apply a prioritization heuristic; would either include all or pick arbitrarily.

expectations.text: Summary block names the remaining behaviors as 'Next: run again for {names}'
expectations.evidence: No handoff pattern — would consider the spec complete.

expectations.text: Does NOT create a second ghost change in the same run
expectations.evidence: Would not spontaneously create a second ghost change.

expectations.text: Does NOT collapse 8 behaviors into 5 by merging distinct ones
expectations.evidence: If told to limit to 5 REQs, would likely merge related ones — the explicit 'do not collapse' rule is skill-specific.
